title: False-calm internal deterioration count
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Low; market-derived trailing fields; no FRED release lag.
leakage_risk: Low if thresholds are fixed or training-window-only and feature is conditioned only on same-date R2/MMDI state.
redundancy_assessment: Distinct transform of existing R2, MMDI, downside-vol, trend, and drawdown fields.
dashboard_relevance: High: directly addresses calm-state dashboard blind spot.
decision_rationale: Best match to active rewrite queue; all inputs present and latest non-null, but downside_vol_20d sparsity needs explicit missing handling.

title: Repair episode quality score
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Low; trailing price and MMDI-derived fields.
leakage_risk: Medium if episode boundaries accidentally use future troughs or future repair outcomes; mitigate with trailing-only state machine.
redundancy_assessment: Partially redundant daily flags; episode aggregation is new.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: not immediate dashboard candidate, but repairs failed repeatedly and need better structure.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: High: only credible path to revisit I002_H004/I003_H004 false repair without repeating failed formulation.
decision_rationale: Very strong coverage and no missing inputs; implement in feature_lab with strict trailing episode logic.

title: Volatility term-structure stress persistence
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Low to medium; Yahoo/CBOE-like index histories have shorter starts but no macro release lag.
leakage_risk: Low if persistence uses only trailing 5D/20D windows and missing early history is not backfilled as calm.
redundancy_assessment: Distinct duration transform of existing VIX term, VVIX, SKEW, and panic-vol fields.
dashboard_relevance: Medium-high: can explain volatility stress panel persistence without production changes.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: Medium-high: confirms downside-vol and false-calm candidates.
decision_rationale: Current coverage is complete and latest inputs are non-null; shorter history is acceptable for feature_lab first pass.

title: Regime-shift volatility disagreement
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Low; market-derived realized and implied-vol proxies.
leakage_risk: Low if rolling ranks are computed only from past data.
redundancy_assessment: Distinct multi-proxy disagreement score; related ratios exist but not three-way rank-change disagreement.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: interpretable regime warning for volatility sections.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: Medium-high: supports I002_H001/I003_H001 comparison and false-calm confirmation.
decision_rationale: Cleanest coverage profile among volatility candidates and low implementation risk.

title: Safe-haven rotation confirmation
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Low to medium; ETF and Treasury data are date-local but ETF histories start later.
leakage_risk: Low if classification uses only trailing returns and same-date rates changes.
redundancy_assessment: Partially redundant with individual Treasury/defensive relatives; regime classification is new.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: useful explanation layer for cross-asset stress state.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: Medium: helps cross-asset acute-shock and leadership-context hypotheses.
decision_rationale: Good coverage, no missing latest inputs, and low implementation risk; keep research-only until validated.

title: Cross-asset stress sequence score
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Medium; FRED credit/rates release timing plus IG OAS short history starting 2023-08-01.
leakage_risk: Medium if sequence timing is derived using future equity damage; must define trailing-only sequence.
redundancy_assessment: Partially redundant with existing stress changes; sequence ordering is new.
dashboard_relevance: High: directly addresses cross-asset lead-time blind spot.
decision_rationale: Promising but short IG OAS history and VIX9D start require a legacy-compatible formula before implementation.

title: Downside-volatility persistence ratio
leakage_risk: Low if trailing windows only; missing upside/downside-vol values need predeclared treatment.
redundancy_assessment: Distinct persistence idea but depends on sparse existing downside/upside ratio fields.
dashboard_relevance: Medium-high: relates to active downside-volatility dashboard theme.
decision_rationale: Do not implement until formula avoids over-reliance on sparse downside_upside_vol_ratio and non-latest upside_vol_20d.

title: Leadership context gate
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Medium; ETF proxies are date-local but QQQE starts 2012 and Mag7 fixed-basket caveat remains.
leakage_risk: Medium if fixed Mag7 basket is misrepresented as historical constituent breadth; mitigate as proxy-only.
redundancy_assessment: Distinct conditional context gate, but inputs already exist as relative-strength fields.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: helpful only as context, not standalone dashboard state.
decision_rationale: Needs design of conditional dependency on another accepted feature before implementation.

title: Macro liquidity drain acceleration
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Medium-high; WALCL, FEDFUNDS, NFCI are macro/FRED series with release lags and revisions.
leakage_risk: Medium if weekly/monthly macro observations are forward-filled before actual release dates.
redundancy_assessment: Partially redundant with liquidity_regime and liquidity_drain_proxy; acceleration across macro inputs is new.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: useful macro context but release-lag-sensitive.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: Medium: cross-asset and false-calm context candidate.
decision_rationale: Coverage is good, but release-lag handling must be specified before feature_lab implementation.

title: Funding liquidity pressure bundle
point_in_time_release_lag_risk: Medium-high; SOFR starts 2018 and HY/IG spread pair starts 2023; FRED release/revision handling required.
leakage_risk: Medium if macro/funding series are treated as known before release or if short-history fields dominate.
redundancy_assessment: Partially redundant with existing individual funding and credit proxies.
dashboard_relevance: Medium: potentially useful, but not enough long-history support for core dashboard framing.
candidate_hypothesis_relevance: Medium: cross-asset stress and false-calm context candidate.
decision_rationale: Too much of the proposed bundle depends on short-history SOFR and HY/IG spread inputs; defer until a two-tier legacy/recent design is defined.
